rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"decision","text":"When complexity_score < 4 (or task is not decomposable), @kody decompose delegates to the normal pipeline instead of splitting the task.","scope":"kody decompose"},{"kind":"convention","text":"String utilities live in src/utils/strings.ts, one function per file, with co-located .test.ts using vitest.","scope":"src/utils"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"'capitalize' means first-char-only by convention; 'capitalizeWords' is a separate function for every-word capitalization — do not conflate them.","scope":"src/utils/strings"}]}
